vocab.sentence: I studied English yesterday.
We studied for the test last night.
He jogged in the park yesterday morning.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他昨天早上在公園慢跑。

vocab.sentence: They watched a movie last night.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他們昨晚看了一部電影。

vocab.sentence: It was very cold last winter.
We were sad about the death of the old man.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們對那位老人的死感到難過。

vocab.sentence: The song reminded me of my mother.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這首歌讓我想起我媽媽。

vocab.sentence: I bought a few apples this morning.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我今天早上買了一些蘋果。

vocab.sentence: Linda was in New York one week ago.
My parents were busy yesterday.
You were at home last night.
She looked after her little sister yesterday.

vocab.chinese: 是（am 和 is 的過去式）
vocab.sentence: He was a student last year.
You must be kind to old people.
My grandfather passed away two years ago.
After all, he is only five years old.
I have sweet memories of my grandmother.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我有關於祖母的甜美回憶。

vocab.sentence: We watched the movie together last night.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們昨晚一起看那部電影。

vocab.sentence: It was sweet of you to help me.
The boys dressed up in costumes.
They danced to music last night.
The students stood in a circle.
We planted flowers in the garden yesterday.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們昨天在花園裡種花。

vocab.sentence: She placed flowers on the tomb.
He placed a candle on the table.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他把一根蠟燭放在桌上。

vocab.sentence: There were ten candles on the cake.
People sweep tombs on Tomb Sweeping Day.
I swept the floor this morning.
I still remember my first teacher.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我仍然記得我的第一位老師。

vocab.sentence: The old tree was dead last year.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那棵老樹去年就枯死了。

vocab.sentence: We welcomed our relatives with joy.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們喜悅地歡迎親戚們。

vocab.sentence: They danced in a lively way.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他們用充滿活力的方式跳舞。

vocab.sentence: Harry was scared of ghosts before.
He came back home two hours later.
The kids shared the candy last night.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 孩子們昨晚分享了糖果。

vocab.sentence: We cooked a big meal for our relatives.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們為親戚們煮了一頓大餐。

vocab.sentence: I shared a room with my brother.
The story was really touching.
We were all sad about that story.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們全都對那個故事感到難過。

vocab.sentence: He had a fear of ghosts before.

phrases.sentence: After breakfast, I have fruit.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 早餐後，我吃水果。

phrases.sentence: We watched the movie together last night.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我們昨晚一起看那部電影。

phrases.sentence: It was very cold last winter.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 去年冬天很冷。

phrases.sentence: It's a movie about animals.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那是一部有關動物的電影。

phrases.sentence: The dress reminds me of my grandmother.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那件洋裝讓我想起祖母。

phrases.sentence: We need a few tables for the party.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我們宴會需要一些桌子。

phrases.sentence: Linda was in New York one week ago.
phrases.sentence_chinese: Linda 一週前在紐約。

phrases.sentence: Please look after my sister for me.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 請幫我照顧我妹妹。

phrases.sentence: Jenny is busy all the time.
phrases.sentence_chinese: Jenny 隨時都很忙。

phrases.sentence: My grandfather passed away two years ago.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我祖父兩年前過世了。

phrases.sentence: We were all sad about that story.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我們全都對那個故事感到難過。

phrases.sentence: Be kind to Ken. After all, he is only five years old.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 對 Ken 要慈愛。畢竟，他才五歲。

phrases.sentence: My friend walked me to school yesterday.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我的朋友昨天和我走路上學。

phrases.sentence: After school, we played basketball.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 放學後，我們打籃球。

phrases.sentence: Ken played basketball with his classmates last Sunday.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 上星期天 Ken 和他的同學們打籃球。

phrases.sentence: They helped us in different ways.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 他們用不同的方式幫我們。

phrases.sentence: The girls talked about the singer all night.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 這些女孩整晚都在談論這位歌手。

phrases.sentence: Chinese people sweep tombs on Tomb Sweeping Day.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 華人在清明節掃墓。

phrases.sentence: We welcomed our relatives with joy.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我們喜悅地歡迎親戚們。

phrases.sentence: They danced in a lively way.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 他們用充滿活力的方式跳舞。

phrases.sentence: Alice was in Japan for New Year's Day on January first.
phrases.sentence_chinese: Alice 一月一日在日本過元旦。

phrases.sentence: The teacher invited her students back to the school.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那位老師邀請她的學生回學校。

phrases.sentence: The boys dressed up in costumes.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 男孩們盛裝打扮。

phrases.sentence: Painting the face is fun.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 臉部彩繪很好玩。

phrases.sentence: We cooked a big meal for relatives last night.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 昨晚我們為親戚們煮大餐。

phrases.sentence: I shared a room with my brother then.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那時我跟我弟弟共用房間。

phrases.sentence: Mr. and Mrs. Brown danced to music in the living room last night.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 昨晚 Brown 夫婦在客廳隨音樂起舞。

phrases.sentence: The students stood in a circle and sang songs.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那些學生圍成圓圈唱歌。

tips.label: be 動詞過去式
tips.text: 主詞＋was/were（＋過去時間）。I/he/she/it → was；you/we/they → were

tips.label: 一般動詞過去式
tips.text: 主詞＋動詞過去式（字尾加 ed），不論主詞是誰都不加 s/es

tips.label: 過去式疑問句
tips.text: Did＋主詞＋原形動詞...?　簡答：Yes, ... did. / No, ... didn't.

tips.label: 疑問詞開頭
tips.text: 疑問詞＋did＋主詞＋原形...?　但 who/what 當主詞時不加 did，直接接過去式動詞

tips.label: 過去時間副詞
tips.text: yesterday、last＋時間、…ago、just now、the day before yesterday，前面不加 in/on/at

notes.title: be 動詞的過去式與使用時機
notes.description: 表達過去的事實或狀態。單數主詞（I/he/she/it）用 was；複數主詞與 you 用 were。句中常搭配過去時間副詞。
examples: Brian was a student last year, but he is a farmer now.
The girls were at the party last night.

notes.title: 過去時間副詞
notes.rule: yesterday（＋時間）／last＋時間／then／before／一段時間＋ago／this morning／the day before yesterday／just now／in the past／in＋過去年代
notes.description: 句中出現這些時間副詞，動詞常用過去式。注意 yesterday、last＋時間前面不加介系詞 in/on/at。
examples: It was very cold last winter.
Linda was in New York one week ago.

notes.title: be 動詞過去式的句型
notes.rule: 肯定「主詞＋was/were...」；否定「主詞＋wasn't/weren't...」；疑問「Was/Were＋主詞...?」
notes.description: 簡答時主詞一律用代名詞：Yes, I was. / No, I wasn't.。否定疑問句（Wasn't/Weren't＋主詞...?）回答時不管問句是否否定，照事實回答。
examples: Were you happy last night? — Yes, I was.
They weren't actresses before.

notes.title: 疑問詞開頭、含 was/were 的疑問句
notes.rule: 疑問詞＋was/were＋主詞...（＋過去時間副詞）?
notes.description: 回答不必用 Yes/No。疑問詞 who 或 what 當主詞時，視為第三人稱單數，用 was。
examples: Where were Tony and Maria last Sunday afternoon? — They were in the movie theater.
Who was outside the restaurant half an hour ago? — Amber was.

notes.title: 一般動詞過去式的規則變化
notes.rule: ①字尾直接加 ed ②字尾有 e 只加 d ③短母音＋子音：重複字尾子音再加 ed ④子音＋y：去 y 加 ied ⑤特殊：picnic → picnicked
notes.description: 過去式動詞不隨主詞變化，一律不加 s/es。例：watched、placed、shared、jogged、planned、shopped、studied、carried、cried。
examples: Tony shopped in the night market yesterday evening.
Amy studied English two days ago.

notes.title: 規則動詞字尾 ed 的發音
notes.rule: ①字尾發無聲子音 → ed 唸 [t] ②字尾發母音或有聲子音 → ed 唸 [d] ③字尾發 [t] 或 [d] → ed 唸 [ɪd]
notes.description: 記憶口訣：無聲配無聲 [t]，有聲配有聲 [d]，[t]/[d] 結尾多一個音節唸 [ɪd]。例：checked/danced/helped 唸 [t]；called/enjoyed/showed 唸 [d]；celebrated/invited/planted 唸 [ɪd]。
examples: watched [t]
jogged [d]
reminded [ɪd]

notes.title: 一般動詞過去式的句型
notes.rule: 肯定「主詞＋過去式動詞...」；否定「主詞＋didn't＋原形動詞...」；疑問「Did＋主詞＋原形動詞...?」
notes.description: didn't/Did 出現後，後面的動詞一律回到原形，字尾絕不可加 s、es、ing 或 ed。簡答：Yes, 主詞＋did. / No, 主詞＋didn't.
examples: The boy didn't wash dishes the day before yesterday.
Did you visit your grandmother last weekend? — Yes, I did.

notes.title: 否定疑問句（一般動詞）
notes.rule: Didn't＋主詞＋原形動詞...? ＝ Did＋主詞＋not＋原形動詞...?
notes.description: 回答照事實，跟肯定疑問句一樣；中譯時 Yes 譯成「不」、No 譯成「是；沒錯」。
examples: Didn't you jog yesterday evening? — Yes, I did.（不，我有。）

notes.title: 疑問詞開頭的過去式疑問句（一般動詞）
notes.description: 不必回答 Yes/No。「What did＋主詞＋do?」問「做了什麼」。疑問詞 what/who 當主詞時不加 did，直接接過去式動詞：What happened?
examples: When did Peter call Lisa? — He called her last Wednesday.
Who saved the little girl? — Tom did.

notes.title: be 動詞與助動詞的代替用法
notes.rule: 用 be 動詞代替前面提過的敘述；用 did 代替前面提過的「動詞＋後面的字」
notes.description: 避免重複，常見於簡答句。
examples: Bill is watching the touching movie, and we are, too.
You danced very well. — We did.

quiz.question: He ___ a student last year, but he is a farmer now.
quiz.hint: last year 是過去時間，主詞 he 是第三人稱單數，be 動詞用 was。

quiz.question: The girls ___ at the party last night.
quiz.hint: 主詞 the girls 是複數，last night 是過去時間，用 were。

quiz.question: It ___ very cold last winter.
quiz.hint: last winter 是過去時間，主詞 it 單數，用 was。

quiz.question: Sophia and Sherry ___ in Japan last year, but they ___ in Taiwan now.
quiz.hint: 兩人是複數主詞，last year 用 were；now 表現在，用 are。

quiz.question: Harry ___ scared of ghosts before.
quiz.hint: before 表「以前」，Harry 是單數主詞，用 was；scared 前面要用 be 動詞，不用 did。

quiz.question: You ___ classmates five years ago.
quiz.hint: five years ago 是過去時間，主詞 you 一律搭配 were。

quiz.question: Ken ___ in the park yesterday morning.
quiz.hint: yesterday morning 是過去時間；jog 是「短母音＋子音」結尾，重複 g 再加 ed → jogged。

quiz.question: Amy ___ English with her son two days ago.
quiz.hint: two days ago 用過去式；study 字尾是「子音＋y」，去 y 加 ied → studied。

quiz.question: Tony ___ in the night market yesterday evening.
quiz.hint: 過去時間 yesterday evening；shop 是短母音＋子音結尾，重複 p 加 ed → shopped。

quiz.question: Mrs. Jones ___ some food for the party last night.
quiz.hint: last night 是過去時間；prepare 字尾有 e，只加 d → prepared。

quiz.question: We ___ the bags to the flower shop this morning.
quiz.hint: this morning 在此指今天早上（已過去）；carry 字尾「子音＋y」，去 y 加 ied → carried。

quiz.question: They ___ Christmas in the restaurant last Saturday.
quiz.hint: last Saturday 是過去時間，celebrate 字尾有 e 只加 d → celebrated。

quiz.question: The boy didn't ___ dishes the day before yesterday.
quiz.hint: didn't 後面一律接原形動詞，不可加 ed、s 或 ing。

quiz.question: Jenny didn't ___ the movie with us last night.
quiz.hint: didn't 已表達過去，後面動詞回到原形 watch。

quiz.question: ___ you visit your grandmother last weekend?
quiz.hint: visit 是一般動詞原形，過去式疑問句用 Did 開頭，不用 be 動詞。

quiz.question: Did your daughter ___ a lesson from this thing?
quiz.hint: Did 開頭的疑問句，主詞後面的動詞用原形 learn。

quiz.question: Did Mr. Wang pass away five months ago? — Yes, ___.
quiz.hint: 用 Did 問就用 did 答；肯定簡答是 Yes, he did.。

quiz.question: Didn't you jog yesterday evening? — ___. I jogged with my sister.
quiz.hint: 否定疑問句照事實回答，後句說「我有慢跑」，所以答 Yes, I did.。

quiz.question: Who ___ outside the restaurant half an hour ago?
quiz.hint: 疑問詞 who 當主詞時視為第三人稱單數，過去時間用 was。

quiz.question: Where ___ Tony and Maria last Sunday afternoon?
quiz.hint: 主詞 Tony and Maria 是複數，過去時間用 were；句中沒有一般動詞，不用 did。

quiz.question: When ___ Peter call Lisa?
quiz.hint: call 是一般動詞原形，疑問詞開頭的過去式問句用 did。

quiz.question: What ___? Why are you crying?
quiz.hint: 疑問詞 what 當主詞時不加 did，直接接過去式動詞 → What happened?

quiz.question: Who ___ the little girl? — Tom did.
quiz.hint: who 當主詞不加 did，直接用過去式動詞 saved；由答句 Tom did 可知是過去式。

quiz.question: What did Amy ___ yesterday morning?
quiz.hint: did 是助動詞，後面接原形動詞 do（此處 do 是「做」的意思）。

quiz.question: My grandfather ___ two years ago.
quiz.hint: two years ago 是過去時間，pass away（過世）用過去式 passed away。

quiz.question: We ___ a big meal for our relatives last night.
quiz.hint: last night 是過去時間，cook 字尾直接加 ed → cooked。

quiz.question: The students stood ___ and sang songs.
quiz.hint: 「圍成圓圈」的固定片語是 in a circle。

quiz.question: Chinese people sweep tombs ___ Tomb Sweeping Day.
quiz.hint: 「在某節日」用 on＋節日 → on Tomb Sweeping Day。

quiz.question: The dress ___ me of my grandmother.
quiz.hint: 「使（人）想起」的句型是 remind＋人＋of＋事/人；remember 是「（自己）記得」。

quiz.question: Please ___ my little sister for me.
quiz.hint: 「照顧」是 look after；look at 是「看」、look for 是「尋找」。

quiz.question: We need ___ tables for the party.
quiz.hint: tables 是複數可數名詞，「一些」用 a few；a little 和 much 接不可數名詞。

quiz.question: Linda was in New York one week ___.
quiz.hint: 「一段時間＋ago」表「…以前」；before 通常單獨存在，不接在時間長度後面。

quiz.question: We watched the movie together ___.
quiz.hint: watched 是過去式，要搭配過去時間副詞 last night。

quiz.question: They were often late ___.
quiz.hint: last＋時間前面不加介系詞 in/on/at，也不加 the，直接說 last year。

quiz.question: Mr. and Mrs. Brown danced ___ music in the living room last night.
quiz.hint: 「隨音樂起舞」的固定片語是 dance to music。

quiz.question: They danced ___ a lively way.
quiz.hint: 「用…的方式」用 in a/an＋形容詞＋way。

quiz.question: We were all sad ___ that story.
quiz.hint: 「對…感到悲傷」的句型是 be 動詞＋sad＋about...。

quiz.question: Be kind to Ken. ___, he is only five years old.
quiz.hint: 「畢竟」是 after all。

quiz.question: The boys ___ in costumes on Halloween last year.
quiz.hint: last year 是過去時間，dress up（裝扮）用過去式 dressed up。

quiz.question: Sherry ___ late for class yesterday morning.
quiz.hint: late 是形容詞，前面用 be 動詞；Sherry 單數＋過去時間 → was。

quiz.question: The bathroom ___ clean then.
quiz.hint: then 是「那時」，表過去；主詞 the bathroom 單數，用 was。

quiz.question: They ___ actresses before.
quiz.hint: before 表過去，主詞 they 複數，否定用 weren't；actresses 是名詞，不用 didn't。

quiz.question: ___ you happy last night? — Yes, I was.
quiz.hint: happy 是形容詞，疑問句用 be 動詞；主詞 you 過去式用 Were。

quiz.question: Wasn't Jake short last year? — ___. He was very tall.
quiz.hint: 否定疑問句照事實回答：他不矮（很高），所以答 No, he wasn't.；Yes 配 was、No 配 wasn't，不可混用。

quiz.question: I ___ busy yesterday, but I ___ not now.
quiz.hint: yesterday 用過去式 was；now 表現在，I 配 am。

quiz.question: Rose: Who was in the night market last night? — Miss Lin: Coco and Mary ___.
quiz.hint: 用 be 動詞代替前面的敘述；答句主詞是兩個人（複數）且是過去時間，用 were。

quiz.question: Peter: You danced very well. — Jack: We ___.
quiz.hint: 用助動詞 did 代替前面提過的 danced very well（一般動詞過去式）。

quiz.question: Alice is a reporter now, but she ___ last year.
quiz.hint: last year 表過去，代替「不是記者」用 be 動詞否定；she 單數 → wasn't。

quiz.question: 下列動詞字尾 ed 的發音，何者唸 [ɪd]？
quiz.hint: plant 字尾發 [t]，加 ed 唸 [ɪd]；washed/helped 唸 [t]，called 唸 [d]。

quiz.question: 下列動詞字尾 ed 的發音，何者唸 [t]？
quiz.hint: dance 字尾發無聲子音 [s]，ed 唸 [t]；enjoyed/showed 唸 [d]，reminded 唸 [ɪd]。

phrases.sentence: After breakfast, I have fruit.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 早餐後，我吃水果。

phrases.sentence: We watched the movie together last night.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我們昨晚一起看那部電影。

phrases.sentence: It was very cold last winter.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 去年冬天很冷。

phrases.sentence: It's a movie about animals.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那是一部有關動物的電影。

phrases.sentence: The dress reminds me of my grandmother.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那件洋裝讓我想起祖母。

phrases.sentence: We need a few tables for the party.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我們宴會需要一些桌子。

phrases.sentence: Linda was in New York one week ago.
phrases.sentence_chinese: Linda 一週前在紐約。

phrases.sentence: Please look after my sister for me.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 請幫我照顧我妹妹。

phrases.sentence: Jenny is busy all the time.
phrases.sentence_chinese: Jenny 隨時都很忙。

phrases.sentence: My grandfather passed away two years ago.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我祖父兩年前過世了。

phrases.sentence: We were all sad about that story.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我們全都對那個故事感到難過。

phrases.sentence: Be kind to Ken. After all, he is only five years old.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 對 Ken 要慈愛。畢竟，他才五歲。

phrases.sentence: My friend walked me to school yesterday.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我的朋友昨天和我走路上學。

phrases.sentence: After school, we played basketball.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 放學後，我們打籃球。

phrases.sentence: Ken played basketball with his classmates last Sunday.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 上星期天 Ken 和他的同學們打籃球。

phrases.sentence: They helped us in different ways.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 他們用不同的方式幫我們。

phrases.sentence: The girls talked about the singer all night.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 這些女孩整晚都在談論這位歌手。

phrases.sentence: Chinese people sweep tombs on Tomb Sweeping Day.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 華人在清明節掃墓。

phrases.sentence: We welcomed our relatives with joy.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我們喜悅地歡迎親戚們。

phrases.sentence: They danced in a lively way.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 他們用充滿活力的方式跳舞。

phrases.sentence: Alice was in Japan for New Year's Day on January first.
phrases.sentence_chinese: Alice 一月一日在日本過元旦。

phrases.sentence: The teacher invited her students back to the school.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那位老師邀請她的學生回學校。

phrases.sentence: The boys dressed up in costumes.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 男孩們盛裝打扮。

phrases.sentence: Painting the face is fun.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 臉部彩繪很好玩。

phrases.sentence: We cooked a big meal for relatives last night.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 昨晚我們為親戚們煮大餐。

phrases.sentence: I shared a room with my brother then.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那時我跟我弟弟共用房間。

phrases.sentence: Mr. and Mrs. Brown danced to music in the living room last night.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 昨晚 Brown 夫婦在客廳隨音樂起舞。

phrases.sentence: The students stood in a circle and sang songs.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那些學生圍成圓圈唱歌。

grammar.sentence: He was a student last year.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他去年是一位學生。

grammar.sentence: My parents were busy yesterday morning.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我父母昨天早上很忙。

grammar.sentence: It was very cold last winter.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 去年冬天很冷。

grammar.sentence: Ken jogged in the park yesterday morning.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Ken 昨天早上在公園慢跑。

grammar.sentence: The girls were at the party last night.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那些女孩昨晚在派對上。

grammar.sentence: Amy studied English two days ago.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Amy 兩天前研讀英文。

grammar.sentence: Tony shopped in the night market yesterday evening.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Tony 昨晚在夜市購物。

grammar.sentence: We cooked a big meal for our relatives.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我們為親戚們煮了一頓大餐。

grammar.sentence: The boys dressed up in costumes last night.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 男孩們昨晚盛裝打扮。

grammar.sentence: She placed a few flowers on the tomb.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 她把一些花放在墳墓上。

grammar.sentence: The students danced to music in a circle.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 學生們圍成圓圈隨音樂起舞。

grammar.sentence: We watched a touching movie together last night.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我們昨晚一起看了一部感人的電影。

grammar.sentence: He didn't wash the dishes yesterday.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他昨天沒有洗碗。

grammar.sentence: Jenny didn't watch the movie with us.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Jenny 沒有和我們一起看電影。

grammar.sentence: They didn't study for the test last night.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他們昨晚沒有為考試讀書。

grammar.sentence: Did you visit your grandmother last weekend?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你上週末拜訪了你的奶奶嗎？

grammar.sentence: Did Mr. Wang pass away five months ago?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 王先生五個月前過世了嗎？

grammar.sentence: Where were you the day before yesterday?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你前天在哪裡？

grammar.sentence: Who was outside the restaurant half an hour ago?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 半小時前誰在餐廳外面？

grammar.sentence: When did Peter call his good friend?
grammar.sentence_chinese: Peter 何時打電話給他的好朋友？

grammar.sentence: What did Amy do yesterday morning?
grammar.sentence_chinese: Amy 昨天早上做了什麼？

grammar.sentence: Who looked after your little sister yesterday?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 昨天誰照顧你的妹妹？

grammar.sentence: The song reminded me of my sweet grandmother.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這首歌讓我想起我貼心的祖母。

grammar.sentence: My grandfather passed away two years ago.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我祖父兩年前過世了。

grammar.sentence: We were all sad about that touching story.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我們全都對那個感人的故事感到難過。

grammar.sentence: After all, he is only five years old.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 畢竟，他才五歲。

grammar.sentence: We welcomed our relatives with joy last night.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我們昨晚喜悅地歡迎親戚們。

grammar.sentence: Weren't you at home yesterday afternoon?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你昨天下午不在家嗎？

grammar.sentence: Harry was scared of ghosts many years ago.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Harry 很多年前很怕鬼。

grammar.sentence: They celebrated Christmas in the restaurant last Saturday.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他們上星期六在餐廳慶祝聖誕節。
